chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Obligations of Hajj

text: 2556 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «وَ اَلْوُقُوفُ بِعَرَفَةَ سُنَّةٌ وَ بِالْمَشْعَرِ فَرِيضَةٌ وَ مَا سِوَى ذَلِكَ مِنَ اَلْمَنَاسِكِ سُنَّةٌ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.2556 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said: "Standing at Arafah is a Sunnah, and standing at al-Mash'ar is an obligation, and everything else from the rituals is Sunnah."
